response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, including AI-agent infrastructure work at Google and cloud-based systems at Meta, with relevant skills in TypeScript, AWS, and agentic workflows — but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade AI solutions, vector databases, RAG architectures, or direct enterprise GenAI deployment, and his resume contains questionable employment claims (e.g., 'Founder, Amazon') that raise credibility concerns.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP at Google
Proven cloud (AWS) and TypeScript/Node.js expertise in production systems
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills
concerns: Ambiguous or potentially fabricated employment claim: 'Founder, Amazon'
No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization experience
Lack of clear timeline or evidence of 8+ years dedicated to AI/ML production systems
